# Project P — Porto Pub Crawl

> Weekly Saturday-night pub crawl in Porto, Portugal. VIP entry to 4 bars plus one nightclub, 9 drinks included, professional photos and video, and an optional sunset-to-nightlife Party Boat add-on.

## Key facts
- Business name: Project P (Porto Pub Crawl)
- What: Guided pub crawl through Porto's nightlife district
- When: Every Saturday, 22:30–02:30 (around 4 hours)
- Meeting point: Praça de Carlos Alberto, 4050-157 Porto, Portugal (look for hosts with pink umbrellas near the statue)
- Price: €17 per person (Porto Pub Crawl), €44 per person (Party Boat + Pub Crawl pack)
- What's included: 9 drinks total (free welcome shots, beer, sangria, drink deals), VIP skip-the-line entry to 4 bars + 1 nightclub, local party guides, free professional photos and video, games throughout the night
- Party Boat add-on: 2-hour night cruise on the Douro river with a live DJ, straight into the pub crawl afterwards
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 1,327+ reviews (Google and Trustpilot)
- Good for solo travelers: yes, most guests arrive alone
- Cancellation: full refund if cancelled 24+ hours before start time
- Contact: [contact@porto-pubcrawl.com](mailto:contact@porto-pubcrawl.com), [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/351910694984), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/pubcrawlporto/)
